rootCause: UCI sample CSV seeding path did not pass students through computeStudentFeatures, so persisted lifestyle_risk_score remained null.
fixApplied: Updated UCI sample loader path to apply computeStudentFeatures before sample seeding insert.
method: Backend sample-loader feature population using existing composite feature service.
beforeBehavior: API returned 649 rows with avg_score but lifestyle_risk_score was null.
afterBehavior: After scoped reseed API returns 649 rows with non-null lifestyle_risk_score and avg_score.
notes: Docs/evaluation/input_csv/UCI source files were absent, but Backend/uploads/UCI files were present; scoped reseed succeeded.
